forum_categories.name: Governance
forum_categories.description: Proposals, voting, and DAO policy discussions.

forum_categories.name: Announcements
forum_categories.description: Official updates from the core team about releases and governance.

forum_categories.name: General Discussion
forum_categories.description: Casual chat, questions, and community topics not covered elsewhere.

forum_categories.name: Support & How-To
forum_categories.description: Get help with minting, trading, staking, and using the DAO.

proposals.title: Community Micro-Grants Wave 3
proposals.description: Fund a new wave of small community grants for tooling, documentation, and educational content.

proposals.title: Spring 2026 Marketing Push
proposals.description: Allocate funds for a coordinated marketing campaign around the new avatar mint and staking programs.

proposals.title: DEX Liquidity Top-Up Q1
proposals.description: Top up GOV-ETH liquidity on the main DEX to reduce slippage for traders.

proposals.title: Core Operations Budget Q2 2026
proposals.description: Set aside funds for infrastructure, audits, and contributor compensation for Q2 2026.

proposals.title: Delegate Program Phase 2
proposals.description: Expand the delegate incentive program and refine reputation scoring parameters.

proposals.title: Creator Residency Pilot
proposals.description: Fund a 3-month residency program for artists contributing to the NFT collections and onboarding materials.

proposals.title: Security Audit Fund 2026
proposals.description: Reserve funds to pay for external audits of the staking and governance smart contracts.

proposals.title: Execute Audit Payout Batch 1
proposals.description: Execute the first batch of payouts to the selected security audit firms.

proposals.title: Adjust Quorum Requirements v3
proposals.description: Slightly raise quorum requirements for high-impact protocol changes while keeping treasury proposals accessible.

proposals.title: Experimental Ad Buy (Cancelled)
proposals.description: Originally proposed a high-risk ad buy on untested platforms; cancelled due to community concerns.

proposals.title: Community Artist Spotlight Series
proposals.description: Feature a rotating set of artists from the community on the homepage and socials, with small GOV rewards.

proposals.title: Update NFT Minting Parameters
proposals.description: Adjust default mint limits and royalty splits for new NFT collections.

delegates.name: Steady Validator
delegates.bio: Long-term protocol contributor focused on security, risk management, and sustainable tokenomics.
delegates.votingRecordSummary: Consistently votes FOR well-audited proposals and AGAINST rushed treasury spends.

delegates.name: Research Guru
delegates.bio: Tokenomics researcher and governance analyst publishing detailed proposal breakdowns.
delegates.votingRecordSummary: Mixed record with nuanced ABSTAIN votes when data is insufficient.

delegates.name: Treasury Hawk
delegates.bio: Specializes in treasury risk and runway analysis with a conservative spending philosophy.
delegates.votingRecordSummary: Frequently AGAINST high-budget marketing and speculative experiments.

delegates.name: Community Builder
delegates.bio: Organizer of community calls and advocate for creator funding and onboarding initiatives.
delegates.votingRecordSummary: Strong FOR bias on community and art-focused Treasury proposals.

delegates.name: Protocol Architect
delegates.bio: Smart contract engineer working on L2 scaling and NFT minting infrastructure.
delegates.votingRecordSummary: High participation on protocol parameter proposals; pragmatic approach to risk.

delegates.name: Newcomer Advocate
delegates.bio: Focused on UX, documentation, and making governance accessible for first-time voters.
delegates.votingRecordSummary: Supports proposals that simplify onboarding and lower participation barriers.

delegates.name: Data-Driven DAO
delegates.bio: Runs dashboards on participation, quorum, and proposal performance to inform voting.
delegates.votingRecordSummary: Transparent rationales with detailed forum posts accompanying each major vote.

delegates.name: NFT Curator
delegates.bio: Early NFT collector focusing on art direction and collection-level strategy.
delegates.votingRecordSummary: Active in proposals around new collections, royalties, and creator incentives.

forum_threads.title: Discussion: Community Micro-Grants Wave 3
forum_threads.body: Opening a thread to discuss the scope and reporting expectations for the "Community Micro-Grants Wave 3" Treasury proposal. What grant sizes make sense, and how should we prioritize tooling vs. educational content?

forum_threads.title: Delegate Program Phase 2 – feedback thread
forum_threads.body: This thread is for feedback on the "Delegate Program Phase 2" proposal. Are the incentive levels appropriate, and what metrics should we track to evaluate delegate performance over time?

forum_threads.title: Quorum Requirements v3 – did we go too far?
forum_threads.body: Following the "Adjust Quorum Requirements v3" proposal, several members raised concerns that the suggested quorum for protocol changes might be too high for the current participation levels. Should we revisit these thresholds or keep them as-is for stability?

forum_threads.title: Q2 2026 Core Ops Budget breakdown
forum_threads.body: Posting a line-item breakdown of the "Core Operations Budget Q2 2026" proposal: infra, audits, contributor compensation, and contingency. Please review the allocations and suggest any rebalancing before the vote closes.

forum_threads.title: Is the DEX liquidity top-up sized correctly?
forum_threads.body: The "DEX Liquidity Top-Up Q1" proposal asks for 1000 GOV to deepen the GOV-ETH pool. Some members think this is too conservative given recent volume spikes. Should we increase the allocation or keep it as proposed?

forum_threads.title: RFC: Update NFT minting parameters
forum_threads.body: Draft discussion for the "Update NFT Minting Parameters" proposal. Topics: max mints per wallet, initial royalty split between creators and the DAO, and whether to introduce a dynamic mint fee based on demand.

forum_threads.title: How big should the Q2 Treasury budget be?
forum_threads.body: We have multiple Treasury proposals queued for Q2 (marketing, creator programs, audits). This thread is for a holistic discussion of how much total GOV we are comfortable deploying in Q2 vs. saving for future cycles.

forum_threads.title: Delegate incentives check-in after first quarter
forum_threads.body: Now that we've run the initial delegate incentive program for a quarter, how do people feel about the results? Are high-reputation delegates getting enough support, and should we adjust rewards based on participation or outcomes?

forum_threads.title: Should we increase max mint per wallet for new drops?
forum_threads.body: Some collectors want higher per-wallet limits on future avatar drops, while others worry about whales dominating supply. Share your thoughts on fair limits and whether we should differentiate between whitelist and public sale caps.

forum_threads.title: Improving new member onboarding
forum_threads.body: Suggestions for making it easier for new members to join.

forum_threads.title: Show your favorite minted avatar
forum_threads.body: Post a screenshot or link to your favorite avatar NFT you minted on the platform and tell us why you like it. Bonus points if it has a Neon City background.

forum_threads.title: Mint transaction failed but gas was used
forum_threads.body: My last mint failed due to a slippage error, but I still paid gas. Is there a way to retry safely, and what settings should I adjust before trying again?

forum_threads.title: New: Live Treasury dashboard & transactions tab
forum_threads.body: We just shipped the new Treasury dashboard with a dedicated Transactions tab. You can now filter by direction, token, and amount, and add specific transactions to your watchlist with notes.

forum_posts.body: Opening a thread to discuss the scope and reporting expectations for the "Community Micro-Grants Wave 3" Treasury proposal. What grant sizes make sense, and how should we prioritize tooling vs. educational content?
This thread is for feedback on the "Delegate Program Phase 2" proposal. Are the incentive levels appropriate, and what metrics should we track to evaluate delegate performance over time?

Following the "Adjust Quorum Requirements v3" proposal, several members raised concerns that the suggested quorum for protocol changes might be too high for the current participation levels. Should we revisit these thresholds or keep them as-is for stability?

Posting a line-item breakdown of the "Core Operations Budget Q2 2026" proposal: infra, audits, contributor compensation, and contingency. Please review the allocations and suggest any rebalancing before the vote closes.

The "DEX Liquidity Top-Up Q1" proposal asks for 1000 GOV to deepen the GOV-ETH pool. Some members think this is too conservative given recent volume spikes. Should we increase the allocation or keep it as proposed?

Draft discussion for the "Update NFT Minting Parameters" proposal. Topics: max mints per wallet, initial royalty split between creators and the DAO, and whether to introduce a dynamic mint fee based on demand.

We have multiple Treasury proposals queued for Q2 (marketing, creator programs, audits). This thread is for a holistic discussion of how much total GOV we are comfortable deploying in Q2 vs. saving for future cycles.

Now that we've run the initial delegate incentive program for a quarter, how do people feel about the results? Are high-reputation delegates getting enough support, and should we adjust rewards based on participation or outcomes?

Some collectors want higher per-wallet limits on future avatar drops, while others worry about whales dominating supply. Share your thoughts on fair limits and whether we should differentiate between whitelist and public sale caps.
Suggestions for making it easier for new members to join.
Post a screenshot or link to your favorite avatar NFT you minted on the platform and tell us why you like it. Bonus points if it has a Neon City background.
My last mint failed due to a slippage error, but I still paid gas. Is there a way to retry safely, and what settings should I adjust before trying again?
We just shipped the new Treasury dashboard with a dedicated Transactions tab. You can now filter by direction, token, and amount, and add specific transactions to your watchlist with notes.
Smaller grants (25–50 GOV) with clear deliverables make sense to me. Maybe reserve 60% for tooling and 40% for educational content so we can still improve docs.
I think the proposed quorum is a bit high for protocol changes right now. Participation is still ramping up, so we risk blocking necessary upgrades.
Could we break out infra costs by provider? It would help compare with past quarters and understand where most of the GOV is going.
Here’s my favorite: a Neon City background with glitch glasses and a holo hoodie. It feels very on-brand for the DAO.
This usually happens when price moves during mint. Try increasing your slippage tolerance slightly and double-check that you have enough ETH for gas plus mint fees before retrying.

treasury_transactions.description: Attempted payout for cancelled experimental ad buy
Artist rewards for Community Artist Spotlight Series
Security audit payout batch 1 - Firm A
Security audit payout batch 1 - Firm B
Partial refund from cancelled vendor engagement
Weekly staking rewards distribution to stakers
Return of unclaimed staking rewards to main treasury
Accumulated protocol trading fees from NFT marketplace
Transfer ETH fees to operations wallet for infrastructure costs
Monthly protocol surplus allocation to main treasury
Provide GOV side of liquidity for GOV-ETH pool
Initial tranche for Spring 2026 marketing campaign
Received core operations tranche 1 from main treasury

collections.name: Neon Avatars
collections.description: A collection of cyberpunk-inspired avatar NFTs featuring Neon City backdrops and customizable accessories like glasses, headgear, and holographic wearables.

collections.name: Street Samurai Avatars
collections.description: Neo-noir warriors from the back alleys of the megacity, designed as profile-picture ready avatars with animated blades and armor.

collections.name: Glitch Punks
collections.description: Corrupted punk avatars rendered with heavy glitch aesthetics, ideal for collectors who love noisy, experimental art.

collections.name: Cyber Cats
collections.description: Feline companions from a neon-soaked future, each Cyber Cat comes with unique cybernetic mods and temperament ratings.

collections.name: Galactic Guild
collections.description: Adventurers, pilots, and mystics from across the galaxy. Each NFT represents a unique guild member with faction, role, and ship affinity traits.

collections.name: Founders Passes
collections.description: Limited-edition membership passes that unlock early access to new mints, boosted staking rewards, and private governance calls.

collections.name: DAO Badges
collections.description: Non-transferable badges commemorating participation in major governance milestones, community calls, and contribution programs.

collections.name: Neon City Posters
collections.description: High-resolution art posters capturing iconic vistas of the Neon City skyline, optimized for large-format displays.

collections.name: On-Chain Graffiti
collections.description: Procedurally generated street art murals permanently etched on-chain, curated by community votes.

collections.name: Raid Loadout Items
collections.description: Game items used in seasonal raid events, including weapons, armor, and utility gadgets that affect on-chain game outcomes.

collections.name: Governance Keys
collections.description: Soul-bound governance keys that grant advanced proposal rights and experimental voting UX features to active contributors.

collections.name: Community Art Bounty Drops
collections.description: Collections of artworks funded by DAO treasury art bounties, focused on onboarding, tutorials, and explainer visuals.
